channel.title: Package Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Package Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA Linux+ (XK0-005): Linux System Management
item.category: "CompTIA Linux+ Course" , "Linux System Administration" , "System Management" , "Storage Management" , "Linux Networking" , "Process Management" , "systemd" , "Package Management" , "Linux Certification" , "DevOps"
item.description: Master Linux system management for the CompTIA Linux+ XK0-005 exam. Learn file management, storage and LVM, networking, processes, systemd services, package management, users, cron, and boot loaders with real command examples.

item.title: Today I Learned how to Create Chocolatey Packages
item.category: "Automation" , "Windows Package Management" , "Package Creation" , "Package Management" , "Infrastructure as Code (IaC)" , "Windows Software Deployment" , "Software Packaging" , "Windows Automation" , "Package Repositories" , "Windows Tools"
item.description: Today I Learned more about Ansible conditionals and variable management
